name: Corn & Tomatillo Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute the tomatillos, onion, and garlic in margarine for five minutes.
2. Transfer the mixture to a food processor.
3. Add the remaining ingredients (next four items listed).
4. Puree the mixture until it is chunky.
5. Return the pureed mixture to the pan.
6. Pour in 3 cups of chicken broth, 4 oz diced green chili peppers, a little chopped spinach, a little whole kernel corn, and 1 teaspoon sugar.
7. Serve topped with a dollop of non-fat sour cream.
Per Serving: 146 calories, 2.7 gm total fat, 0.6 gm sat fat, 1mg cholesterol
